items.title: NSE formally approves IPO in first step towards its long-delayed public markets debut
items.description: NSE formally approved its IPO and cleared the formation of an IPO committee to oversee and execute the listing process. Such a panel is mandatory for companies without promoters looking to go public.

items.title: Hero MotoCorp’s new CEO lays down priorities for the two-wheeler giant
items.description: CEO Harshavardhan Chitale has listed the areas where he plans to focus to drive growth for India's largest two-wheeler maker. &nbsp;Here's what he plans to focus on…

items.title: 31 killed, over 169 injured in suicide bombing at Shia mosque in Pakistan
items.description: The explosion occurred at the Khadijatul Kubra mosque-cum-imambargah, which caters to the Shia denomination, in the Tarlai area of Islamabad

items.title: JK Tyre sees profit quadruple in Q3 on volumes, easing raw material costs
items.description: JK Tyre reported its highest-ever quarterly revenue in Q3 FY26 as volumes recovered and raw material costs eased, helping profits rebound sharply from a weak base last year

items.title: NSE Q3 PAT drops 37% to ₹2,409 crore, IPO committee reconstituted
items.description: Transaction charges, which constitute over two-thirds of the total income, fell 12 per cent Y-o-Y.  The decline likely reflects lower trading volumes and market activity

items.title: Uber, Rapido, Ola, and Porter drivers plan nationwide strike on Saturday
items.description: Some of the drivers' demands include government-notified minimum base fares for ride-hailing platforms, decided in consultation with drivers

items.title: RBI frees branch expansion for large gold-loan NBFCs
NSE board approves IPO via OFS, reconstitutes committee to oversee listing
items.description: Sebi's NOC, granted last Friday, marks a major step for the NSE, whose IPO plans were stalled for a decade due to regulatory issues and the co-location controversy

items.title: Tech giants offer up to $600,000 to promote AI, but many creators are unconvinced — here's why
items.description: Tech giants like Microsoft and Google are paying influencers to promote their AI products, with payouts reaching up to $600,000. This trend is growing as AI companies ramp up digital ad spending, but

items.title: 'Tirupati laddus had bathroom cleaning chemicals'
PFC board approves bringing REC into its fold
items.description: While presenting the Budget 2026, finance minister Nirmala Sitharaman had said the restructuring of PFC and REC is the initial step towards improving the efficiency of public-sector NBFCs.

items.title: Why PhysicsWallah is betting on schools to fix what coaching can’t
items.description: After building a test-prep empire, edtech firm PhysicsWallah is pushing into K–12, arguing that earlier intervention will deliver stronger long-term outcomes.

items.title: Iran moves to rapidly repair nuclear sites
Tata Steel Q3FY26 profit jumps multifold to ₹2,688.7 cr, revenue up 6.4%
items.description: Surge in Tata Steel's Q3 profit comes on the back of improving profit margin, which rose to 4.79 per cent in Q3FY26, from 0.55 per cent in the same quarter last year

items.title: Kaynes posts 11% sequential revenue drop on delayed railway order, cuts FY26 target
items.description: Kaynes Technology reported a sequential revenue and profit decline, trims FY26 guidance and flags delayed Kavach execution for Indian Railways, even as rival Syrma SGS reports growth and turns cash-fl

items.title: Novo Nordisk shares rebound after FDA warning on illegal weight-loss drugs: Copycat maker Hims and Hers responds

items.title: PFC approves in-principle merger proposal with REC after Budget 2026 push
items.description: PFC's board has approved an in-principle merger with REC after the Budget 2026 proposal to restructure the two public-sector NBFCs. The merger details are yet to be finalised
